# Ateed Tech - Custom Software Development Company

## About
Ateed Tech is a custom software development company based in Boynton Beach, Florida. We specialize in building web applications, mobile apps, enterprise software solutions, and AI-powered systems.

## Services
- Requirement Definition: Creating comprehensive requirement definitions for custom software development
- Consulting and Prototyping: Aligning custom software vision with business goals
- UX/UI Design: Bridging business goals and user needs through intuitive design
- Web Development: Fully custom websites built from the ground up
- Mobile App Development: End-to-end iOS, Android, and cross-platform app development
- Enterprise Software Solutions: Custom enterprise software that streamlines operations
- API and System Integration: Seamlessly connecting disparate systems and applications
- AI/ML and Data Engineering: Generative AI, machine learning, and data engineering solutions

## Industries We Serve
- Retail: Elevating customer experiences and streamlining operations
- Logistics: Speed, accuracy, and operational efficiency solutions
- Healthcare: Custom software for clinical workflows and patient experience
- Manufacturing: Optimizing inventory, supply chains, and production automation
- Services: Streamlining operations for service providers

## Technology Stack
- Design: Figma, Adobe XD, Illustrator, Photoshop
- Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, React, Vue.js, Bootstrap, Tailwind
- Backend: Java, Python, Node.js, .NET Azure
- Mobile: React Native, iOS, Android, Flutter
- Database: SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
- AI & Data Science: TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, OpenAI
